Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Strength Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Strength Icon is also known as the Fist Icon or the Symbol of Bodily Power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider can manifest the authority of the Strength Icon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Strength Icon provides authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Strength Icon is an object manifested by a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Strength Icon is carried by the body of the Netherworld Empress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Strength Icon was one of the ideals Malice strove for.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider uses a Strength Icon to feel things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider sensed the echo of the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Strength Icon resonated with the Dragon Icon during Northstrider's working.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
